channel.title: Ranger on Zuluhotel Omega
channel.description: Recent content in Ranger on Zuluhotel Omega
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2024 Zuluhotel Omega. All Rights Reserved.

item.title: Animal Lore
item.description:
Strength Assessment

Strength Message
1-75 Very Weak
76-100 Fairly Weak
101-150 Not so Strong
151-300 Fairly Strong
301-500 Strong
501-1000 Very Strong
1001 or higher Tremendously Strong

Hunger Level

Time until release Message
30 Minutes It looks very hungry!
60 Minutes It looks pretty hungry.
As long as you feed it, never It looks well fed.

item.title: Animal Taming

item.title: Archery

Icebow 5d5+5 35 Normal Yes

Crossbow 5d4+7 30 Normal Yes

Thunder Crossbow 6d6+3 23 Normal Yes

item.title: Camping
item.description:
To use camping you double-click kindlings either in your backpack or on the ground.

You can also gather kindlings by double-clicking a dagger and target a tree.

Using a bedroll next to a lit kindle will make your character logout after 30 seconds.

item.title: Cooking
item.description:
Cooking is used by double-clicking the ingredient to what you want to make near the correct type of fire.

The food value shows how much the food type will fill you up when eaten.

The cooking method determines wich fire type you will need.

Cooking Method

Method Fire type
0 None
1 Requires a fire
2 Requires an oven
3 Can be cooked in both oven and fires

Cooking

Item Materials needed Skill required Food value Cooking Method
ball of dough flour x 1 water x 1 mixing bowl 10 0 0
cooked rib raw rib x 1 20 1 3
cooked bird raw bird x 1 20 1 3
sweet dough flour x 1 honey x 1 mixing bowl 20 0 0
cake batter flour x 1 egg x 1 honey x 1 mixing bowl 20 0 0
pie crust flour x 1 honey x 1 rolling pin mixing bowl 20 0 0
pizza crust flour x 1 water x 1 rolling pin mixing bowl 20 0 0
cooked fishsteak raw fishsteak x 1 30 1 3
bacon bacon slab x 1 frying pan 30 1 1
fried eggs egg x 1 frying pan 30 2 1
bread ball of dough x 1 30 3 2
muffins ball of dough x 1 30 1 2
baked ham raw ham x 1 40 3 3
cooked sausage raw sausage x 1 frying pan 40 3 1
french bread ball of dough x 1 40 3 2
cooked rib (5) raw rib x 5 50 1 3
cooked fishsteak (3) raw fishsteak x 3 50 1 3
cooked bird (5) raw bird x 5 50 1 3
leg of lamb raw leg of lamb x 1 50 4 3
pancakes flour x 1 milk x 1 frying pan mixing bowl 50 4 1
cornmuffins ball of dough x 1 milk x 1 50 2 2
cheese pizza pizza crust x 1 cheese x 1 50 5 2
plate of cookies sweet dough x 1 50 4 2
cake cake batter x 1 50 5 2
pumpkin pie pie crust x 1 pumpkin x 1 50 5 2
lemon-herb fish brown fish x 1 lemon x 1 frying pan 60 5 1
fried chicken leg raw chicken leg x 1 lard x 1 frying pan 60 3 1
garlic bread ball of dough x 1 garlic x 1 60 5 2
apple cake cake batter x 1 apple x 1 60 6 2
apple pie pie crust x 1 apple x 1 60 6 2
apple cider hops cones x 1 glass of water x 1 apple x 1 60 8 3
ale hops cones x 1 glass of water x 1 60 8 3
wine grapes x 1 glass of water x 1 60 8 3
cooked ribs (7) raw rib x 7 70 1 3
cooked fishsteak (4) raw fishsteak x 4 70 1 3
cooked bird (7) raw bird x 7 70 1 3
honey baked ham raw ham x 1 honey x 1 70 5 3
onion rings onion x 1 lard x 1 flour x 1 frying pan 70 6 1
vegetarian pizza pizza crust x 1 cheese x 1 lettuce x 1 70 7 2
onion pizza pizza crust x 1 cheese x 1 onion x 1 70 7 2
apple fritters sweet dough x 1 apple x 1 70 6 2
lemon tarts sweet dough x 1 lemon x 1 70 6 2
carrot cake cake batter x 1 carrot x 1 70 7 2
peach cobbler pie crust x 1 peach x 1 70 7 2
beef jerky raw rib x 1 80 2 1
smoked salmon blue fish x 1 80 6 1
baked ham (2) raw ham x 2 80 3 3
sausage pizza pizza crust x 1 cheese x 1 raw sausage x 1 80 8 2
lemon cake cake batter x 1 lemon x 1 80 8 2
lime cake cake batter x 1 lime x 1 80 8 2
coconut cream pie pie crust x 1 egg x 1 coconut x 1 80 8 2
mincemeat pie pie crust x 1 raw rib x 1 carrot x 1 turnip x 1 80 8 2
chicken potpie pie crust x 1 raw bird x 1 carrot x 1 turnip x 1 80 8 2
cooked ribs (10) raw rib x 10 90 1 3
cooked fishsteak (6) raw fishsteak x 6 90 1 3
cooked bird (10) raw bird x 10 90 1 3
coconut cake cake batter x 1 coconut x 1 90 9 2
lemon meringue pie pie crust x 1 egg x 1 lemon x 1 90 9 2
key lime pie pie crust x 1 egg x 1 lime x 1 90 9 2
banana cream pie pie crust x 1 egg x 1 banana x 1 90 9 2
cooked fishsteak (8) raw fishsteak x 8 100 1 3

sushi yellow fish x 1 120 8 0

item.title: Fishing
item.description:
To fish you will need a fishing pole or special fishing net.

If you have a weapon equipped while fishing you will cut all normal fishes to raw fish steaks directly (magic fish won’t be cut).

Having a Fishing Rod of Sacrifice equipped will double the amount of fish caught.

Normal Fishing

Item Skill required
Normal Fishes 0
Random map: lvl 1-4 0
Special fishing net 0
Gold 0
Aquaria Shell 1 0
Capricornia Shell 2 0
Sea Nymph 3 0
Neptune’s Nautilus 4 120
Sea Shore Sand Dollar 5 120
Magic fish 120

Fishing Nets

Item Skill required
Gold 0
Old money-bag 0
Magic fish 0
Fishing trophy 0
Bone armor / Heavy crossbow 0
Sea Shore Sand Dollar 5 0
Divinia Shell 6 0
Mermaid Shell 7 0
Ocean Odyssey 8 100
Talimari 9 100
Bonearms of Terror 120
Bonegloves of Terror 125
Bonelegs of Terror 130
Bonetunic of Terror 135
Bonehelm of Terror 140
One Handed Dart Thrower of Amroth 150
Fishing Rod of Sacrifice 150

Magic Fish

Item Effect Duration Amount
Bless Fish Bless 5 Minutes 25
Agility Fish Agility 5 Minutes 35
Cunning Fish Cunning 5 Minutes 35
Strength Fish Strength 5 Minutes 35
Cure Fish Cure * Lvl 10
Heal Fish Heal * 50
Invisibility Fish Invisibility * *
Night Sight Fish Night Sight 30 Minutes *

item.title: Forensic Evaluation
item.description:
Forensic evaluation is used on corpses to find out the killer, looter, skinner and if skill is high enough even the time of death.

Forensic evaluation is a “free” skill for rangers and won’t count towards their spec or offspec skill count.

item.title: Tracking
item.description:
Tracking can be used to track either players or NPC’s.

Higher tracking and specialized ranger class will increase the range.

To track bosses you will need at least 135 and 150 for super bosses.

item.title: Veterinary
item.description:
To use veterinary you will need to double-click clean bandages and target an animal either alive or dead to try to heal/cure or resurrect it.

Animal Lore will increase the amount healed by veterinary.

You will need at least 100 animal lore to resurrect an animal.

Veterinary difficulties

Type Bandages needed Skill required
Normal heal 1 * Depends on missing health.
Cure level 1 poison 2 35
Cure level 2 poison 2 55
Cure level 3 poison 2 75
Cure level 4 poison 2 95
Cure level 5 poison 2 115
Cure level 6 poison 2 135
Resurrect 5 100 Animal lore * Veterinary depends on the taming difficulty.

Creatures with poison hit

Curing creatures is a good way to train Veterinary.

item.title: Ranger
item.description:
Skills

  • Animal lore
  • Animal taming
  • Archery
  • Camping
  • Cooking
  • Fishing
  • Tracking
  • Veterinary

Bonuses

  • Bonuses in all their specialized skills.
  • Deals increased damage with ranged weapons.
  • Can have forensic evaluation skill free of charge, won’t count toward spec skills or off-spec skills.

Penalties

  • Can’t wear plate armor or shields.
  • Can only cast up to circle 5 spells.
